description_long: This is a vertical street banner mounted on a tall, slender black pole with a horizontal crossbar at the top. The banner itself is a fabric or vinyl sheet, hanging down from the crossbar and featuring two distinct designs on either side. One side displays a geometric logo with orange and blue color blocks and text, while the other side shows a promotional image with a person using augmented reality glasses and a tech-themed logo. The pole is anchored to a square base, providing stability for outdoor placement. The banner is designed to be eye-catching and durable, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks or near building entrances. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal for the pole and synthetic material for the banner.
description: A vertical street banner on a black metal pole with a square base, featuring colorful promotional graphics on both sides. The banner is designed for outdoor urban display and is supported by a sturdy frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange and blue geometric logo and text on the banner, with the black pole and crossbar clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the pole and banner, with minimal visibility of the banner's graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the alternate side of the banner, featuring a person with AR glasses and a tech-themed logo, along with the supporting pole and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile of the pole and banner, similar to view 1, with little detail of the banner's content.
